ADB-DriverLEFT_C1A-HS_HHNv4

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference ADB_DriverLEFT_C1A_HS_HHNv4_20200326T130842.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DA72F2
Receive ID 18DAF272
Functional Addr 7B
Functional Name ADB-L
